world.shape: The Even Land: a single continent planed unnaturally flat and smooth by the gods at the dawn of days, so their gift of magic could flow evenly along dead-straight leylines. Rivers run slow and wide; roads run true for a hundred miles; at the world's rim the land simply stops, falling into the mists of the Worldfall.
world.map: At the center, the Kingdom of Vairelle and its capital Aurelance, built where nine leylines cross. Eastward lies the Greywatch March, the fortified shield of the realm, and beyond it the Hearthshires and the Reedmark: belts of free villages under old pacts with the Kindred. Farther east still, the Empire of Voss. In Vairelle's green west sits Coldbrook, ducal seat of House Advain.
world.magic_and_technology: Magic is a gift from the gods (high magic, medium tech). It flows along the leylines and is anchored by the Kindred: small, uncannily endearing god-beasts the Ancients once lived beside in harmony. The gift runs strongest in god-touched bloodlines, the royal line of Vairelle above all. The Empire of Voss has no patience for gifts: its war-engines are fired by caged Kindred, and each cage quietly frays covenants older than any border. Before the war, the Voss-chartered Gildern Foundry sold charming Kindred-lit parlor engines in Aurelance itself.
world.kingdoms_and_nations: The Kingdom of Vairelle (its royal blood the living conduit of the gods' gift); the expansionist Empire of Voss to the east, a magitech power that fires its engines with caged Kindred; between them the Hearthshires, free villages under the old pacts, and the Reedmark, annexed by Voss twelve years ago. The Greywatch March, held by Isabeau's line, is the kingdom's shield.
world.historical_events: The God-Planing, when the gods leveled the world and gave it magic. The Age of Harmony, when the Ancients lived beside the Kindred. The Erasure: the Ancients vanished, and every record of who overthrew whom was scoured from stone and memory. The Founding of Vairelle at the Ninefold Cross. The Reedmark War, twelve years ago, when Voss swallowed the free Reedmark villages — the war where young Kestrel Vane served under General Advain, and which ended in retreat. And this spring: Voss crossed into the Hearthshires. The war rages now.
world.enigmas_and_mysteries: Who was overthrown in the war that history forgot, and by whom? Where did the Ancients go? Why do the Kindred gather in growing numbers at the Greywatch March — directly in the invasion's path — as if waiting for something? And how does Voss cage the gods' gift at all: what did the Empire learn that the gods did not give?
world.threats: The Empire of Voss's invasion, prosecuted by marshals like Eira the Ashen, who burns leyline shrines where she passes. The engine-cages, each one fraying the old covenants a little further. And the wartime court of Vairelle itself, where fear makes knives of courtiers.

group.choose_group_type: Guardians: with the war raging in the east, the royal children have been sent from Aurelance to their cousin Lady Cateline at Coldbrook, seat of Duke Advain, who commands the eastern host at the front. Countess Isabeau, their maternal aunt, escorts them — chafing, since the Greywatch March her family holds is the very shield the Empire is battering. Their tutor, Magister Kestrel Vane, is publicly a good-hearted buffoon and secretly Advain's planted blade. The children's mother, the Queen, is spoken of at court only in the past tense.

_prompts.shape: Choose a shape for your world.
_prompts.map: Grab a map sheet that fits your concept (or draw a custom map).
_prompts.magic_and_technology: Decide the role of magic and technology in your setting.
_prompts.kingdoms_and_nations: Create the major kingdoms and nations, mark their borders, and discuss their relations.
_prompts.historical_events: Discuss the major historical events that shaped your world.
_prompts.enigmas_and_mysteries: Define the great enigmas and mysteries of the world.
_prompts.threats: Determine the terrible threats that cast a shadow over your world.
